caption:
What if the most powerful thing you wore this season asked for nothing — and said everything?

There is something about a slip dress that feels like a quiet declaration. The blush satin moves with you, unhurried, while the gold and silver embroidery at the neckline catches whatever light finds its way in. It is the kind of piece that belongs equally to a slow island morning and to wherever the evening decides to take you. Swipe to feel both.

Slip dress: @rabenssaloner
